name: Garlic, Cheese, and Nut Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the garlic using a garlic press.
2. Beat the crushed garlic into the softened cream cheese until smooth.
3. Blend in the sour cream, diced onion, paprika, curry powder, chili powder, and dill (fresh or dried) until well combined.
4. Fold in the shredded cheddar cheese and chopped walnuts.
5. Serve at room temperature or chilled. Makes about 2 1/2 cups of dip.
6. Suggested dippers: sesame crackers, celery, radishes, string beans.
